allow: PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "-m", "http.server", "8080" -WorkingDirectory "D:\\zqjie\\中秋网站" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Output "Server started on port 8080")
PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "-m", "http.server", "8080" -WorkingDirectory "D:\\zqjie\\中秋网站" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1.5; Write-Output "Server ready")

PowerShell($session = New-Object Microsoft.PowerShell.Commands.WebRequestSession; $loginBody = @{username='admin';password='admin123'}; $login = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/login" -Method POST -Body $loginBody -UseBasicParsing -SessionVariable session; "Login status: " + $login.StatusCode; if \($login.Content -match "千年溯源|探索中秋"\) { "✓ Login successful, redirected to page" } else { "Checking content..." }; $origin = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/origin" -UseBasicParsing -WebSession $session; "Origin status: " + $origin.StatusCode; if \($origin.Content -match "上古时期"\) { "✓ Origin page has era data" } else { "✗ Missing era data" }; if \($origin.Content -match "秋夕祭月"\) { "✓ Origin page has content" } else { "✗ Missing content" })

PowerShell(cd "D:\\zqjie\\中秋网站"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "server.js" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Server OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Server FAIL: $_" })
